summary.weather: Seoul (Sunday, March 29 morning: Mostly cloudy, 9°C, light breeze)
summary.market: Global markets closed. Friday saw sharp declines across U.S. and European indices driven by Middle East conflict, rising oil prices, and inflation fears. U.S. markets in correction territory.
summary.art: Market recovery shows 4% growth in 2025. Current focus on established artists and institutional validation. Whitney Biennial 2026 ongoing in NYC.
